heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3324 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Codificationand made identical amendments to this section. The amendments by were repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Amendments2018—Subsec. (a)(2). substituted “2023” for “2018”.Pub. L. 115–3342014— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There is authorized to be appropriated $7,500,000 for each of the fiscal years 1991 through 2012. Funds appropriated under this section or may not be used to acquire or construct a building.”Pub. L. 113–79section 3323 of this title2008—, substituted “2012” for “2007”.Pub. L. 110–246, § 71402002— substituted “2007” for “2002”.Pub. L. 107–1711998— substituted “2002” for “1997”.Pub. L. 105–1851996— substituted “1997” for “1995”.Pub. L. 104–1271990— substituted “each of the fiscal years 1991 through 1995” for “each fiscal year beginning after the effective date of this subchapter, and ending with the fiscal year ending ” and inserted at end “Funds appropriated under this section or may not be used to acquire or construct a building.”Pub. L. 101–624section 3323 of this titleSeptember 30, 19901985— in amending section generally, struck out subsec. (a) designation, substituted “fiscal year ending ” for “fiscal year ending , and not in excess of such sums as may after , be authorized by law for any subsequent fiscal year”, and struck out subsec. (b) relating to allocation of funds and consultations by Secretary with Board in development of plans for use of funds.Pub. L. 99–198September 30, 1990September 30, 1985December 22, 1981

children.text: $7,500,000 for each of fiscal years 1991 through 2013; and
$5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2023.

children.heading: Prohibition on use
children.label: b Prohibition on use
children.text: Funds made available under this section may not be used to acquire or construct a building.
